## Summary

Created `internal/generate/invariants_test.go` — a white-box `package generate` test file (no build tag) that is a pure **consumer** of the P1.M6.T3.S2 harness, proving PRD §18.1 / §20.2:

| Test | §20.2 Property | Proof |
|---|---|---|
| `TestInvariants_IdempotentIndexAcrossFailurePaths` (4 subtests) | **Idempotent index** | `git diff --cached --name-only` byte-identical before==after on parse-fail, timeout, dup-exhaustion **and** CAS-fail |
| `TestInvariant_AtomicHEAD_CASFailureIsNoOp` | **Atomic HEAD** | CAS-fail is a no-op: HEAD subject == decorator's `"concurrent commit elsewhere"`, stagehand commit is **dangling** (not reachable from HEAD), parent==beforeHead, stdout clean |
| `TestInvariant_SnapshotImmutableAfterConcurrentStaging` | **Snapshot immutability** | `git cat-file -p <TREE>` stable after mid-run staging; a fresh `write-tree` yields a different SHA |
| `TestStatic_NeverCallsGitCommit` / `_NeverForceUpdatesRef` / `_UpdateRefOnlyCASGuarded` | **Static tripwires** | go/ast scan (comments excluded) finds no `"commit"`, no `"--force"`, and exactly one `"update-ref"` site guarded by `if expected != ""` |

**Validation gates (all green):**
- Level 1 — `go vet ./internal/generate/`: clean
- Level 2 — `go test ./internal/generate/ -run 'TestInvariant|TestStatic' -v -count=1`: 6 funcs / all subtests PASS
- Level 3 — `go test ./internal/generate/ -count=1`: `ok 2.161s` (reused S2 harness intact, no regression)
- Level 4 — `gofmt -s -l internal/generate/invariants_test.go`: empty output

Key design fidelity to the PRP: the CAS row does **not** assert `beforeHead==afterHead` (the decorator moves HEAD by construction) — instead it proves the *no-op* semantics via the dangling-commit negative proof; the AST scan uses `go/ast` (not `strings.Contains`) so source comments like *"Stagehand NEVER runs git commit"* cannot false-fail; stdlib + `internal/{config,git,provider,ui}` only — no new deps.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Created internal/generate/invariants_test.go (white-box package generate, no build tag, stdlib + internal only). All 4 validation gates pass: go vet clean; the 3 invariant + 3 static tests all PASS under -run 'TestInvariant|TestStatic'; the full package test is green (ok 2.161s, no regression to the reused S2 harness); gofmt -s -l prints nothing. Zero production .go files modified (git diff --stat empty). The file proves PRD §18.1/§20.2: idempotent index across all 4 failure paths, atomic HEAD (stagehand commit dangling on CAS-fail), snapshot immutability under concurrent staging, and AST static tripwires (no git commit, no --force, single guarded update-ref)."
}
```
